title: Values, Types, Coercion, and Equality · Semantics Case: Equality Sameness
summary: Normalize prices, quantities, identifiers, optional fields, and validity signals from a mixed service-data feed. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js equality sameness increment in a value-normalization and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose strict equality, Object.is, or collection sameness based on NaN, signed zero, identity, and domain needs.
Predict implicit coercion and prefer explicit conversion at external data boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
